★ Aanbevolen partner€€€ · 16 banen

NAC — Nueva Alcantara Club

World's Best Padel Club 2023, 2024 & 2025

✓Buiten
✓Restaurant
✓Gym
✓Lessen

NAC — Nueva Alcantara Club is the world's best padel club three years running (2023, 2024 & 2025), awarded by PadelSpain World Padel Awards. The club features 16 panoramic outdoor courts on artificial grass — including the iconic Range Rover Central Court with grandstands — plus the M3 Padel Academy, THE I/O Concept gym (2,000 m²), Soul by Breath restaurant, Oxygen SPA with normobaric chamber, and an official Adidas pro shop. Open to everyone — no membership required.

Waarom hier spelen

  • World's Best Padel Club 2023, 2024 & 2025 (PadelSpain Awards)
  • 16 panoramic outdoor courts incl. Range Rover Central Court
  • M3 Padel Academy — one of Europe's top coaching institutions
  • THE I/O Concept gym — 2,000 m² with classes & personal training
  • Soul by Breath restaurant, Oxygen SPA & Adidas pro shop
  • Open to all — no membership required, book via Taykus
Boeken via PlaytomicBezoek website
Adres: Av. de Barcelona, 8, 29670 San Pedro de Alcántara, Málaga · Bekijk op Google Maps →
